children.heading: Tennessee Valley Authority jurisdiction
children.label: a Tennessee Valley Authority jurisdiction
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as replacing or superseding .section 831y–1 of title 16

children.heading: State jurisdiction
children.label: b State jurisdiction
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as extending or diminishing the jurisdiction or authority of any State over the siting, construction, monitoring, or managing of artificial reefs within its boundaries.
